name: sketchybar
title: SketchyBar
description: Inspect, control, and troubleshoot SketchyBar from Raycast.
author: tongy

commands.name: configure
commands.title: Configure
commands.subtitle: SketchyBar
commands.description: Open, inspect, and reload SketchyBar configuration.

commands.name: peek-menu-bar
commands.title: Peek Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: SketchyBar
commands.description: Briefly hide SketchyBar so you can use native macOS menu bar items, then restore the configured hidden state automatically.

commands.name: diagnostics
commands.title: Diagnostics
commands.subtitle: SketchyBar
commands.description: Check SketchyBar installation, configuration, and live state.

preferences.name: configPath
preferences.title: Config File
preferences.description: Optional path to the SketchyBar config file. When set, Reload uses this file explicitly.

preferences.name: defaultPeekSeconds
preferences.title: Default Peek Duration
preferences.description: How long SketchyBar should stay hidden when peeking at the native macOS menu bar.

preferences.name: restorePreviousHiddenState
preferences.title: Restore Previous Hidden State
preferences.description: After peeking, return SketchyBar to the hidden or visible state it had before the peek started instead of always showing it.
preferences.label: Restore the previous hidden state after peeking

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
